body:
And it comes at the expense of so many Americans’ futures. |
---
| | | | [ ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4e1054041d7e5f86f81a4c18bccb614583ee6116d7c2feaead25b7ad33ffa62ffc7cc03ba356c4d7869534bfa46c270193e2981d46baca6)
---

Peter,

Democrats, the media, and Hollywood have decided they'd rather see our country fail than succeed with President Trump at the helm.

While their childish decision to play politics with our country may not come at a cost to them, they are selfishly hurting the millions of working Americans who voted for a new direction for our nation.

**I want to assure you that my father understands that the livelihood of so many Americans is at stake. Americans need relief -- and he 's fighting for you.**

_No matter what the Left throws his way, no matter how they try to obstruct him, I can guarantee you that our President will keep fighting until our America First platform becomes the law of the land._

---

Peter,

**Let 's take a look at our numbers:**

In 2017 alone, over **8OO,OOO** Americans have contributed online to support President Trump and our agenda to Make America Great Again!

That's right, almost a million hard-working patriots like you have made our movement unstoppable, and we're only 6 months into this Administration.

**It 's truly historic, Peter.**

**Together, we have raised more from small-dollars donors than Hillary Clinton or Bernie Sanders COMBINED, but we bet you 've never heard the media report on that. So we wanted to point that out.**

So many patriots have already stepped up to join President Trump, chipping in $5, $10, $50, $150 -- anything to Make America Great Again!

Let's keep going. Let's keep winning. Let's keep fighting, Peter.

name: Keith Ellison
subject: re: Monday's deadline
body:
Let's start August with momentum on our side.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before Monday's deadline to help elect Democrats in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052301b/4067b0a/32315f558/7e6c20fc/3191954436/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/July-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170729_ke_nd&source=em_20170729_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170729_ke_nd")**

Derek --

I was up until the early hours of Friday morning, watching as the Republicans' bill to take our health care away was defeated.

Moments like that -- with activists continuing to raise their voices outside the Capitol and across the country until the final vote was cast -- are why I'm proud to be a Democrat.

When we come together and organize for the values we believe in, we can win fights like this one. And we can bring that same energy and passion to win at the ballot box, too.

Let's use this moment as a rallying cry to move our resistance forward and to channel this movement into votes at the polls. Before Monday's deadline, pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats keep bringing the fight to the GOP and winning.

"" Derek -- I was up until the early hours of Friday morning, watching as the Republicans' bill to take our health care away was defeated. Moments like that -- with activists continuing to raise their voices outside the Capitol and across the country until the final vote was cast -- are why I'm proud to be a Democrat. When we come together and organize for the values we believe in, we can win fights like this one. And we can bring that same energy and passion to win at the ballot box, too. Let's use this moment as a rallying cry to move our resistance forward and to channel this movement into votes at the polls. Before Monday's deadline, pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats keep bringing the fight to the GOP and winning. subject: It's working
body:
Our message is working but there is still a lot more to do. As
you know, I support fixing Obamacare and replacing it with a
conservative solution but it must be done in a bipartisan way
that will produce meaningful and lasting results.

Peter, our message is working
but there is still a lot more to do.

As you know, I support fixing
Obamacare and replacing it with a conservative solution but it
must be done in a bipartisan way that will produce meaningful and
lasting results.

This message is resonating more
and more each day as Republican leaders join our call for a
common-sense solution.

But there is still more work to
do and we have a critical fundraising deadline on Monday. Are you
able to help us out with a quick online donation to help us pay
for the tools that are getting our message out?

I will also be a guest on Fox
News Sunday and hope you can tune in. Check your local listing
(here).

America's best days are ahead. I
believe that wholeheartedly but we'll get there much faster if
our leaders will start working for the American people and
finding meaningful solutions to our greatest challenges.

We're all in this together. Thank
you for all that you're doing to help.

-John

name: Tim Phillips
subject: More Money in Your Pocket
body:
Announcement on Taxes = Big News
| | [Web Version](http://view.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=a9613d2d072775cc7a7d3c2eef1791c6ab893301452e814361d73417a871e9b2e5908c921618c24f542ed6a93fd57764669aa2792a3ebef2cedefc6612ad644bd7724a628d4e90ce)
---
| | | | [ ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=70c11f1cfab9abac935cbcce461ffcc7d1b855ec10a4ae9a029c9cd2297f3e3848f5db5bc856a5d816191b519ea6b17a65d95d604b3f4052 "https://americansforprosperity.org/")
---
| | | | |
---
| | Peter,

Did you see what the White House and Congress just said about tax reform?

They just sent a message that they're unifying, that major tax reform is a top priority, and that it should get done WITHOUT hitting you with a new trillion-dollar consumer tax called the BAT.

As you know, AFP has been standing against this damaging policy, which taxes imports on many of the things we use in our everyday lives. >From groceries, to auto parts, to school supplies, and clothing....you name it, it gets more expensive under a BAT consumer tax.

This is a major victory for you, the volunteers that power Americans for Prosperity, and who do the hard work of reaching out to policymakers and educating your neighbors.

Today is a moment to celebrate. Then we move on to accomplish principled, pro-growth tax reform that can improve lives, free up more disposable income, create better job growth, and more!

We're working together with leaders in Congress and across government to make sure they can deliver on this promise for you this year.

History shows that these smart reforms work - in fact, we published a whole study that proves it!

[_Click here to find out more about the benefits of tax reform!_](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=70c11f1cfab9abac5a497bf4154daf4ce892942593ac028f70a5d7a62ad28da3f07931c99183d4647d017af64b14d375797e77b402de6fe3 "Click here to find out more about the benefits of tax reform!")

Together, we can do this, but we need your engagement. Stay on the lookout for opportunities in your own neighborhood. We'll be working all summer long to reach out to lawmakers and get this done.

Much lies ahead,

Tim Phillips
President
Americans for Prosperity

---

Hello everyone,
If you're reading the many news reports about how Washington Republicans' plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act failed by just one vote, you're in good company.
But those reports are wrong. The number is actually 1,017.
Thanks to you, 1,017 is the number of votes we won our Senate race in New Hampshire by, defeating a Republican incumbent.
**Without your hard work, there likely would have been one more vote for Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump 's health care plan, and we'd be one step closer to ripping health coverage away from millions of people.**
Your work to elect Senator Hassan is proof that every single vote matters and that even when the outcome is uncertain, we can never stop fighting for what is right.
While the health care vote earlier this week is well worth celebrating, there is no denying that we've got a long road ahead of us. Washington Republicans could reignite the health care fight at any moment, and we're living with one of the most reckless and unpredictable administrations in decades.
You're living proof that every single voice matters, and you've shown that we cannot afford for a single person to stay silent.
Friends? We're so grateful that you've chosen to speak up. But we have our work cut out for us, and we need to recommit to standing up for the issues that matter most:
[**Please, add your name to recommit to making your voice heard in the fight for our shared values.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdede/2a380d31/1ecfeb01/fe5f6a/2506901374/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/recommit-to-progressive-values?source=e20170729_votes_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")

name: Ian Sams
subject: It came down to a single vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek --

Late Thursday night, Tim Kaine stood on the Senate floor, fighting to keep health care affordable and accessible as the Senate hurtled towards a repeal of the ACA. We held strong and defeated those efforts 49-51, so coverage remains intact for countless Virginians and Americans.

**But watching the future of health care come down to one single vote was unnerving. And the truth is, having Tim Kaine in the Senate made the difference. After Thursday night, one thing became abundantly clear:[We absolutely cannot afford to lose this seat.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=6HZwfxTYSdVJ39pBOBnEv4L1XO235ENW)**

We need someone committed to sitting down and doing the real work of governing, with both Republicans and Democrats, to make life better for families across the country -- and that's Tim.

Our team's end-of-month fundraising deadline is on Monday, and we've still got a ways to go to reach our goal of $60,000. If we can hit it, we'll send a message that Virginians want to keep Tim in the Senate.

**[Chip in $10 or whatever you can right now.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=o3Vlyuoh%2BsM6FZmz9YTvBoL1XO235ENW)**

Thanks -- talk soon,

Ian Sams
Communications Director

name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: Completely barbaric
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6569/24c69fd9/be698d3e/189907c7/2271113597/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE743N_digital_email_20170729_EOMStateLaws_inact&source=WQEFE743N_digital_email_20170729_EOMStateLaws_inact")
---

Peter,

State Republicans are at it again.

In June, Iowa lost a third of their Planned Parenthood clinics in a single day because state Republicans defunded the organization. And New Hampshire Republicans were so eager to pass anti-choice legislation that they accidentally made it legal for pregnant women to kill people.

If you thought those were outrageous, what happened in Arkansas will make your blood boil: This month Republicans passed a law requiring women seeking abortion care to consult men who impregnate them. That means survivors of rape or domestic violence have to basically get permission **_from their attackers_** in order to get an abortion.

**[State and local Republicans are completely out of control, and it's well past time to replace them. Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women across the country who will protect women and women's rights.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6569/24c69fd9/be698d3e/189907c0/2271113597/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170728_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+State+and+local+Republicans+are+complete&utm_campaign=WQEFE743N_digital_email_20170729_EOMStateLaws_inact&source=WQEFE743N_digital_email_20170729_EOMStateLaws_inact")**

In Kentucky, Republicans gained control of the House for the first time in 95 years in November. Now the GOP has total control over the state government, and anti-choice extremists are using it to try and close the very last abortion clinic in the state.

They've launched a full campaign to harass patients and doctors at the clinic, including the first coordinated clinic blockade in over a decade. One of the groups organizing the campaign is led by a man who called women who have abortions murderers and blamed 9/11 on legal abortion.

And in Texas, Republicans aren't focused on bringing down their sky high maternal mortality rate which is the highest in the developed world. Instead, they're trying to pass legislation to strip away licenses from doctors who perform abortions.

These attacks are not just bad for women living in these states. Anti-choice politicians across the country will often take up an idea once they see it pass in other places. And Donald Trump's presidency has emboldened anti-choice extremists to escalate their attacks on clinics, doctors, and women.

**Fed up with these barbaric laws? Want to stop them before they spread? Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will put an end to this assault on women's rights:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-More-Pro-Choice-Women](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6569/24c69fd9/be698d3e/189907c1/2271113597/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170728_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectMoreProChoi&utm_campaign=WQEFE743N_digital_email_20170729_EOMStateLaws_inact&source=WQEFE743N_digital_email_20170729_EOMStateLaws_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6569/24c69fd9/be698d3e/189907c2/2271113597/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170728_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE743N_digital_email_20170729_EOMStateLaws_inact&source=WQEFE743N_digital_email_20170729_EOMStateLaws_inact")

| | _**A Note From Jeanie**_ | |

| **Dear Derek,**
**Today,[ Governing.com described Governor Sununu in its article “6 Months In, How Are Rookie Governors Doing?” as THRIVING.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbU2TaSnfpY5c9c9detvGYEAe00boZnv-2BPWhxk-2FP-2B-2F-2BF0VYqyB92pMA9HKctEQmO-2FzXfGIGK9Ocrab8AN3NomT-2BHQxhZPb-2BHAh1rjl8scw8kv_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MCLj6l4lYZhKCV5GEI7sHjQmj6axkK6h9bBJOQM8GKM04U4lK6cbW2I8-2Bbq8mK2Uot4EDncWE0QIgIEAQn-2BHsIF2GugYoS-2Bz6DnqLE3JCldGl3h3hugtZPwgs6yXmccLAOWuzRhCckJHVlmbLzLbC1Nfs9bJOzBLSzlEFH7HanH-2B6jSzg6luiIZVPn4jpOiIwhTU3RVyLfzDXnsVBw5MgAucL39dqWn4fG4gPqgNue6axh0dSDf8tDkIiDdWUS2glTwU7H4A9iJjki2hWkcl45Q-3D-3D)**
**That is spot on. Our Governor is leading on the issues and diligently working to improve our economy, business climate, and quality of life here in the Granite State.**
**It is refreshing, to say that least, that we FINALLY have a Governor who is a doer...not a talker. Working together, NH Republicans are making a real difference.**
**[Just last week](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyMQ9S-2FyAVr8ak3vuVlmM0MMXPuq5L-2FGlFUk9wJSFHpGSx33uPR0B7tDxvXmVGbvsXq20-2B9gNReJtUkZVXwUDIAg-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MCLj6l4lYZhKCV5GEI7sHjQmj6axkK6h9bBJOQM8GKM04U4lK6cbW2I8-2Bbq8mK2Uot4EDncWE0QIgIEAQn-2BHsIHYcYktEGjEW9qQ0mHq72-2F9jTTjZAwdWdy2Pcb82nguls8vYAa7W-2FTnVFJT-2FKHkC07S3C0Y2ykvdVQvByZ-2FdXNEAnRpf2J3XzN2CyLJM-2FQKR2IkT2bq96Yozi7adUe34vC5OpJstRikUs1doctcwxh-2FWFNWpL36-2BdIrzE8-2F3TjkixEIMJ37P6jcCB-2BcrvGqeOw-3D-3D) the Governor announced the elimination of over 1600 obsolete regulations. “When it comes to working with state government, far too many small business owners have to fight to get to ‘yes,’ and that’s not right. We need to encourage and support common sense customer service,” said Governor Sununu.**
**[The Governor and legislators are currently touring the state showcasing SB38](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyMQ9S-2FyAVr8ak3vuVlmM0MMXPuq5L-2FGlFUk9wJSFHpGSrsywdQHaezzi6-2B3NryclKuXLhhkEEL5mTi-2BGzkrT5Qk-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MCLj6l4lYZhKCV5GEI7sHjQmj6axkK6h9bBJOQM8GKM04U4lK6cbW2I8-2Bbq8mK2Uot4EDncWE0QIgIEAQn-2BHsIB9Oi-2Bn4wgwIDWK6uPoyzFXsJ57wTVH3H9tWRtFaP1SLtZEhj92W0uN2Jy-2FhPJCrQs07dI1S0o0vFMwqd4P7OIar7qyXDacOn-2FK6UU-2BreVMxJtQoU-2BfZtCtaJPLG-2FXRQwpl7HJW4l8ML4vgRsSXrA61Al1PO6CxUQsQUdh-2BAyj1hMlaCI6dOkQ9T4DXrYZBdEg-3D-3D), which is returning over $30 million to New Hampshire communities for infrastructure improvements and property tax relief. | | Peter,

When Joe asked me to be his campaign manager, I knew it was going to be a tough job. It was no surprise to hear one pundit recently say this could be a $100M race.

But I also know the only way to break this ridiculous cycle of special interest spending in our campaigns is by electing folks like Joe -- people who have fought for a constitutional amendment that would overturn the _Citizens United_ decision that opened the floodgates for big spending by Super PACs.

Here's the catch, though: If Joe is going to fight to fix the damage of _Citizens United_ , then he needs to overcome the dark money groups that utilize it. **We need to meet the Koch Brothers and their buddies with a massive grassroots response every single time they attack -- and we don 't get to choose when they strike. [Chip in $5 now to help Joe build a Dark Money Defense Fund to respond to attacks >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2753/7377f838/373662b9/51fb23a4/1940392559/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-cu?refcode=20170729nd&amount=10")** Special interest groups spent over $12 million to defeat Joe in his 2012 campaign. This time around, conservative megadonors are working to make $12 million look like spare change. The NRA, Great America Alliance, and Koch-backed Americans for Prosperity have already attacked Joe THIS YEAR. And it's all because of _Citizens United_.

Why are the these millionaires spending their money on negative campaign ads? They know that by using unlimited funds to mislead voters, they can tilt the scales of an election in favor of politicians that will look out for their own bottom line.

**[Enough is enough. Chip in $5 now to help Joe build a Dark Money Defense Fund to respond to attacks so he can go back to the Senate and end the harmful effects of _Citizens United_ >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2753/7377f838/373662b9/51fb23a4/1940392559/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-cu?refcode=20170729nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Peter Hanscom
